_comment: Golden fixture: Twilio Messages API response shapes. Built from the documented API contract; Chunk 9's integration checklist verifies a live capture matches this shape and refreshes it if not. Tests must not invent their own response objects — they build from this. All values are obvious fakes (555 numbers, fake SIDs).

invalidToNumber.message: The 'To' number +17075559876 is not a valid phone number.

trialUnverified.message: The number +17075559876 is unverified. Trial accounts cannot send messages to unverified numbers; verify +17075559876 at twilio.com/user/account/phone-numbers/verified, or purchase a Twilio number to send messages to unverified numbers.
